milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17a.1 — Hotfix for M9.17a. Phone review showed the learn-item title was still bleeding past the card's right edge on long titles like 'Custom slash commands — the real leverage' and 'Blender + AI hybrid — the Young Carpets hero shot'. Root cause was a second layer: the ⋯ menu is absolute-positioned at top:4px right:6px (28×28) on .learn-item-wrap and the .learn-item itself reserved no gutter for it, so the title's flex-row ellipsized AT the card edge, floating under the menu button. Added .learn-item:has(+ .learn-menu) { padding-right: 44px; } so the title truncates before the menu zone. Items without a menu (Done/mastered) keep the original padding — no wasted right gutter.
